name: Kyndryl Holdings, Inc.
description: Kyndryl Holdings, Inc. is a leading global technology services company that designs, builds, manages, and modernizes complex, mission-critical information systems. As a provider of infrastructure services, the company offers advisory, implementation, and managed service capabilities to enterprise customers in more than 60 countries. Kyndryl focuses on helping organizations navigate digital transformation by maintaining the reliability and performance of their core technology environments, ensuring that businesses can operate efficiently in an increasingly digital world. The company was formed as an independent entity following its spin-off from IBM's Managed Infrastructure Services division.
